title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rivigo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Rivigo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Rivigo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
